description_long: This factory building features a rectangular, utilitarian structure with a flat roof and two prominent cylindrical smokestacks rising from one side. The exterior is clad in a light, concrete-like material, with a band of horizontal vents or narrow windows running along the upper portion of the walls. At the rear, a large loading dock door is visible, accompanied by a wide concrete ramp for vehicle access. The building sits on a slightly raised base, suggesting a reinforced foundation. The overall design is functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on industrial efficiency.
description: A rectangular, flat-roofed factory building with two tall smokestacks, horizontal vents, and a large loading dock door with a ramp.
description_view_0: Front and side of the building with both smokestacks visible and the horizontal vent band prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the base of the smokestacks and the extended concrete ramp.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the large loading dock door and both smokestacks, with the ramp leading up to the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with one smokestack partially visible and the ramp extending away from the building.
